profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Pratama Widya Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides geotechnical engineering services to the private and government sectors in Indonesia. It operates through Construction Revenue, Trading, and Accommodation segments. The company offers geotechnical investigation services; foundation services comprising bored piles, piling, injection piles, and loading tests; retaining wall services consisting of soldier piles, contiguous piles, sheet piles, secant piles, and diaphragm walls; grouting, jet grouting, deep mixing, and soil cement stabilization services; and slope reinforcement and dewatering services, such as soil nailing, shotcretes, ground anchors, rock bolts, and deep watering services. It also engages in the wholesale trade of building materials and metal goods for construction materials; manufacture of goods from cement and lime for construction; mortar and ready-mix concrete; accommodation; and real estate activities. PT Pratama Widya Tbk was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia.
